name: UTRICLE CYST
definition: dilatation of prostatic utricle (sometimes believed to be a remnant of the müllerian duct)
dominant_finding: usually 8-10-mm long pear-shaped cyst posterior to urethra
discriminating_features: usually 8-10-mm long pear-shaped cyst posterior to urethra
NO extension above base of prostate (DDx: müllerian duct cyst, usually larger with extension

general: usually 8-10-mm long pear-shaped cyst posterior to urethra
NO extension above base of prostate (DDx: müllerian duct cyst, usually larger with extension
